## Skill Information

- **Repository:** https://github.com/nimayazdi93/NiORM-skill
- **Skill name:** niorm-skill
- **Install:** `npx skills add nimayazdi93/NiORM-skill`
- **License:** MIT

## Description

Agent skill for NiORM — a lightweight .NET ORM for SQL Server and MongoDB. Covers entity mapping, DataCore services, CRUD, LINQ Where queries, raw SQL with SqlParameterHelper, logging, and security patterns.
